channel.title: DeliveryLink Government Contracting Guides
channel.description: Government contracting readiness guides for small businesses.

item.title: How to Get Government Contracts
item.description: Learn how to get government contracts with a practical readiness-first plan for SAM registration, UEI, capability statements, opportunity research, and proposal follow-up.

item.title: SAM Registration Guide
item.description: A plain-English SAM.gov registration guide for small businesses preparing to compete for federal contracts.

item.title: Capability Statement Guide
item.description: Learn how to create a capability statement that federal buyers and prime contractors can understand quickly.

item.title: UEI Registration
item.description: Learn what the Unique Entity ID is, when you need it, and how it fits into SAM.gov and federal contracting readiness.

item.title: Government Contracts for Small Business
item.description: A small business guide to federal contracting readiness, opportunity targeting, set-asides, subcontracting, and first steps.

item.title: How to Sell to the Government
item.description: Learn how to sell to the government with a readiness-first federal sales process for small businesses.
